Interface Persistence.DatabaseProperties

All Known Implementing Classes:
PersistenceConfiguration
Enclosing class:
Persistence
public static interface Persistence.DatabaseProperties
Properties used to specify the database platform when JDBC metadata is not available.
Since:
4.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    DATABASE_MAJOR_VERSION
    The value returned by DatabaseMetaData.getDatabaseMajorVersion(), for use when JDBC metadata is not available.
    static final String
    DATABASE_MINOR_VERSION
    The value returned by DatabaseMetaData.getDatabaseMinorVersion(), for use when JDBC metadata is not available.
    static final String
    DATABASE_PRODUCT_NAME
    The value returned by DatabaseMetaData.getDatabaseProductName(), for use when JDBC metadata is not available.
